problem_statement: Customer Churn Prediction. A telecom company wants to build and evaluate logistic regression models to predict which customers will churn, using demographic and service usage features.
question: Using the full logistic regression model (all features, standardized, train split), predict on the test split at the default 0.5 threshold. Report the precision (positive predictive value) for the churned class, rounded to 2 decimal places.
agent_instructions: The data source is a directory of CSV files. Inspect only the files needed for the question and compute the answer directly in notebook code. Use sklearn LogisticRegression with max_iter=1000, random_state=42. Use StandardScaler fit on train.
